title: Better Crash Reports
description: This is a mod which aims to improve the Minecraft Crash Report so that it will be clearer to know what the error is and why it happens.
body:
# Better Crash Reports
A mod which aims to improve the Minecraft Crash Report so that it will be clearer to know what the error is and why it happens.
# Why?
The original Minecraft Crash Report is too hard for many players to understand, while AI may gives a totally wrong answer for some of the crashes, and developers are annoyed from the people who ask them there is a problem with the mod by a totally wrong crash report analysis.
# What does this mod do?
This mod rebuild the Minecraft Crash Report System, so it will be more clearer to see whats wrong with the Minecraft and the mods. The Crash Reports generate by this mod bring more important informations, for example the mods loaded, to the front of the Crash Report. 
![Mod lists](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a788a58b60bfc320e936eff72c00f782ed9e8b18.png)

Further more, the mod will try to generate advise for the user, so that user can try to fix the problem with themselfs.

![Example crash advise generated by Better Crash Reports](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0075afde533ffbca17ff9773ef4013edcf2e40cf.png)

Also, this mod provides Chinese(Simplified) translation to the users, which are more friendly to the users which not very familiar with English.
![Chinese(Simplified) crash advise generated by Better Crash Reports](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/512a86df6c30e298fd2673e8b33b10801ddbdd20.png)

# Capability
Currently, Better Crash Reports support a wide range of Minecraft from 1.15 to 1.21.11. This means that you can run it on almost every version of Minecraft that supports fabric loader.

# Other informations
This mod **cannot** prevent you from crashing. It only provides a modified Crash Report that can give you more informations about crashing.
